watch: A Tier-0/1 research firm (TrendForce/Counterpoint) publishing a precise, dated HBM market-share figure -> could upgrade the market-share claim from vendor-claim to confirmed
Any SEC filing or SK Hynix disclosure giving a final, audited use-of-proceeds breakdown -> cross-check against the Yongin/Cheongju figures reported by Korean financial press
Longer-term share price performance beyond day one, if it becomes a notable follow-up (e.g. a large post-IPO swing)
